name: Mike the Pike Productions, Inc.
summary: Mike the Pike Productions, Inc., a media holdings company, engages in the development, production, and distribution of motion picture/entertainment content worldwide. It develops, produces, and licenses genre films; and publishes graphic novels, as well as focuses on identifying and securing literary assets. The company was formerly known as Pine Ridge Holdings Inc. and changed its name to Mike The Pike Productions, Inc. in August 2009. Mike The Pike Productions, Inc. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Fort Wayne, Indiana.
